overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character exploring a tropical plantation settlement at night. The character walks along stone pathways and dirt roads past colonial-style stone buildings with warm lantern light contrasting against cool moonlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated stone walkway along fortress wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated stone walkway beside the fortress wall, passing lit torches

entered.detail: tall stone wall with weathered texture and mounted torches
elevated stone pathway with rectangular tiles
low stone wall railing along the edge of the walkway
burning torch mounted on the stone wall casting warm orange light
dark arched entrance in the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow elevated stone walkway adjacent to a fortress wall. Warm torchlight illuminates the left side while the right side opens to a dark courtyard below. The path is constructed of stone tiles with a low stone railing.

events.description: descends from elevated walkway into open courtyard area
moves from torch-lit wall into open area illuminated by moonlight and building windows

agents.ego_description: walking down stone steps into the courtyard, approaching the main plantation house

notable_agents.action: guard standing near the doorway of the main house

entered.detail: stone steps leading down from the elevated walkway
large two-story stone building with red tiled roof and chimney
tall stone chimney rising from the main house
wooden wagon with white canvas cover parked near the house
stack of wooden barrels near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: The character descends stone steps into an open courtyard dominated by a large plantation house with a prominent chimney. A wooden cart sits to the left and a guard stands near the entrance. The lighting shifts from warm torchlight to cooler moonlight as the character enters the open area.

events.description: exits stone courtyard onto dirt path surrounded by vegetation
character turns slightly right to follow the dirt road

agents.ego_description: walking past the main house and through the plantation grounds on a dirt path

entered.detail: simple wooden structure with open sides
unpaved dirt trail with patches of grass
wooden wagon wheels leaning against a fence
rustic wooden fence marking property boundary

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the stone courtyard onto a dirt path surrounded by tropical vegetation. Wooden outbuildings and fences line the route as the character proceeds away from the main house. The ground transitions from cobblestone to packed dirt.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt road leaving plantation with stone wall

events.description: moonlight becomes more prominent as character moves away from building lights

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt road away from the settlement, passing stone walls and tropical plants

entered.detail: imposing stone structure with arched windows and red roof
wooden steps leading up to the stone building
dense tropical forest visible in the moonlight
stacked barrels near the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the dirt road as the plantation buildings recede. A large stone building with arched windows appears on the right, with wooden stairs leading up to it. The surroundings become more natural with dense tropical vegetation and the moonlit sky dominating the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, torch-lit fortress walkway down into a moonlit plantation courtyard. It begins with the character walking along an elevated stone path, where warm torchlight flickers against a fortress wall and a low railing overlooks a dark void. As the character reaches the end of the walkway, the camera descends a set of stone steps, transitioning the lighting from the orange glow of torches to the cool, pale tones of moonlight. The scene then opens into a wide courtyard dominated by a large plantation house with a prominent chimney, passing a wooden cart and a stationed guard.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a structured colonial courtyard into the wilder, moonlit outskirts of a tropical plantation. It begins as the character moves from a stone courtyard onto a packed dirt path, leaving the main house behind while passing wooden outbuildings and fences. As the character proceeds, the ground shifts from cobblestone to earth, and the surrounding tropical vegetation becomes denser. The scene then opens up as the plantation buildings recede, revealing a large stone structure with arched windows and wooden stairs on the right. Finally, the camera pushes further into the natural landscape, where the architecture gives way to lush greenery under a dominating moonlit sky.
